revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:一箕古墳群]]
{{Infobox ancient site|coordinates={{Coord|37.51244444444445|N|139.94605555555555|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}}}

{{One source|date=2013rd year 10月21日 (月) 08:10 (UTC)}}
'''Ikki Kofun Group''' ({{ill|Ikki Kofun Group|ja|一箕古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ikki Kofun Group|qq=}}) is a {{ill|kofun group|ja|古墳群|1=Kofun cluster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/kofun group|13=User:Immanuelle/Kofun cluster|qq=}} located in {{ill|Aizuwakamatsu|en|Aizuwakamatsu|qid=Q237699|lt=Aizuwakamatsu|1=Aizuwakamatsu}}, {{ill|Fukushima Prefecture|en|Fukushima Prefecture|qid=Q71707|lt=Fukushima Prefecture|1=Fukushima Prefecture}}, specifically in {{ill|Ikki Town|ja|一箕町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ikki Town|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135579207|1=Ikki Machi}}. It consists primarily of three large {{ill|Zenpokoenfun|en|Zenpokoenfun|qid=Q11268718|lt=Zenpokoenfun|1=Zenpōkōenfun}} constructed on hilltops. The Kofuns date from the early 4th century to the 5th century and are representative of the early {{ill|Kofun period|en|Kofun period|qid=Q459939|lt=Kofun period|1=Kofun period}} in the {{ill|Tōhoku region|en|Tōhoku region|qid=Q129465|lt=Tohoku region|1=Tōhoku region}}.

== Main Kofun ==
* {{ill|Ōtsukayama Kofun|en|Ōtsukayama Kofun|qid=Q11381233|lt=Aizu Otsukayama Kofun|1=Ōtsukayama Kofun}}  
* {{ill|Dogasakuyama Kofun|ja|堂ヶ作山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dogasakuyama Kofun|1=Dogasakuyama Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q17219563}}  
* {{ill|Iimoriyama Kofun|ja|飯盛山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iimoriyama Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135579209|1=Iimoriyama Kofun}}  

In addition to these, numerous {{ill|round Kofuns|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/round Kofuns|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} and {{ill|yokoana bo|ja|横穴墓|1=Yokoanabo|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/yokoana bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokoanabo|qq=}} (rock-cut tombs) have been identified.

== References ==
* Hidehito Tsuji, *The Foundation of Tohoku Kofun Research: Aizu Otsukayama Kofun*, "Learning from Historical Sites" Series 029, Shinseisha, 2006.


== See Also ==
* {{ill|List of Kofun in Japan|ja|日本の古墳一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Kofun in Japan|1=list of kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11505809}}  
* {{ill|List of Historic Sites in Japan|ja|日本の史跡一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Historic Sites in Japan|1=lists of National Historic Sites|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11505811}}
